title: phacelia californica var. rotundata
intro: Phacelia californica var. rotundata, also known as California or Round-leaved Phacelia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phacelia californica var. rotundata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
